rooms.name: General
rooms.description: Default community room for broad discussion.

rooms.name: Introductions
rooms.description: A low-friction room for new members to say hello.

_comments._overview: Relay-backed community configuration for the Flotilla-compatible foundation.
_comments.space.id: Stable app-level identifier for the configured space.
_comments.space.name: User-facing display name.
_comments.space.enabled: Turns the community space on once a real relay and group configuration are in place.
_comments.space.relayUrl: Primary relay URL for this community space. v1 supports a single primary relay per space.
_comments.space.managementUrl: Optional HTTP endpoint for relay management operations (NIP-86).
_comments.space.groupId: Primary NIP-29 group identifier for the space membership boundary.
_comments.space.requiresAuth: Whether relay access should expect authentication challenges.
_comments.space.private: Whether the space is private by default.
_comments.space.protected: Whether the space should use protected/private metadata flows when supported.
_comments.space.rooms: Configured rooms within the space. Rooms may define their own groupId or inherit the space groupId if omitted.
_comments.space.rooms[].default: Exactly one room should be marked as the default room.
_comments.space.rooms[].requiresMembership: Whether a granted space or room membership is required to participate.
